title: Plants & Zombies
description: A Plants Vs. Zombies mod for Minecraft
body:
A Plants vs. Zombies mod for Minecraft.

Plants & Zombies is a Plants vs. Zombies themed mod that aims to add mechanics and characters from the game into Minecraft in a totally integrated, survival friendly way. This mod adds over 20 unique mobs, as well as some unique blocks and items.

Features & Notes:

- Various types of helpful plants can spawn naturally in specific biomes. - In order to tame and place these plants, Sun is needed. - Sun is also used to obtain more plant seeds from plants. - Sun can be aquired from sun producing plants. However, killing plants will also provide a small amount of sun. - Naturally spawned zombies have a small chance to spawn as a "Leader" Zombie. These zombies have more health and can spawn reinforcements. These zombies will be carrying a flag. - Special zombies types can spawn naturally under certain conditions. - Some special zombies can only be encountered during the Zombie Raid event. - Plants can only be place on vaild ground or in plant pots. - Plants that are planted in plant pots have increased defense against zombies and other enemies. Spoiler
